subcodes.title: Words to Mary MacNutt et al in 1904
subcodes.first_line: If you asked me a hundred questions, two hundred more would spring up in your mind before I answered them. Truth is not like a pool of water... Be as a running stream fed from an infinite reservoir. Come into a station where you do not need to ask questions.
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
